cards.back: A variant of gradient descent that uses a single example from the training dataset at each iteration
A variant of gradient descent that uses a small group of examples from the training dataset at each iteration
A technique used to speed up convergence by adding a fraction of the previous gradient to the current gradient
A variant of gradient descent that uses a different update rule to accelerate convergence
A process where the parameters of the model converge to their optimal values, minimizing the loss function
